data.title: RED: Add desync guard eval test case for design-wireframe
data.description:
## Description

Add a promptfoo eval test case to design-wireframe evals that asserts the desync guard behavior: when regenerating wireframe.svg for a story with design:approved tag, the tag should be cleared and user warned.

Note: design-wireframe eval config was scaffolded by sibling story dd09-c73e task e06a-8501. If it does not exist yet, scaffold it first with generate-skill-eval.sh.

### Files to modify
- Modify: `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml`

## TDD Requirement
The eval test case must FAIL (RED) against current SKILL.md which has no desync guard.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Eval config contains desync guard test case
  Verify: grep -q 'desync\|design:approved.*clear\|regenerat' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
